label: Outdoor GS Demo
description: Autoware Leo Drive ISUZU bag1+bag2+bag3+bag4+bag5+bag6 fused in a shared ENU frame (GNSS + /tf_static pose-import, image-projected RGB init). gsplat 30k iter with LiDAR depth supervision, per-image appearance embedding, and joint 6-DOF pose refinement. 1.48M gaussians filtered to 60k gaussian centres for this Three.js point viewer; see splat.html for the 80k-gaussian splat render and splat.html?url=assets/outdoor-demo/outdoor-demo-dust3r.splat for a pose-free DUSt3R variant.
